prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent an external signal from being treated as a PhysicsGuard variable unless target identity, unit/conversion, revision, confidence/review, temporal coverage, and mapping evidence are current.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Current PhysicsGuard target variable and unit inventory
Current conversion, revision, and lineage evidence
Current temporal coverage, confidence, and review state

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against signal and target variable mismatch
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the governed external signal does not bind to the intended PhysicsGuard variable
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against unit or conversion is invalid
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: unit evidence or conversion semantics are missing, inconsistent, or physically invalid
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against revision or temporal evidence is stale
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: revision identity or temporal coverage no longer matches the source data
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against review or confidence is unresolved
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: required review, evidence, or confidence disposition is incomplete
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
